tonight_tidbit.text: Early April baseball is its own thing. Cold hands, fast wind, the season finding its legs.

notable_injuries.description: Millas was removed from Tuesday's game against the Marlins with an upper lip laceration, Kyle Williams of TheBanner.com reports.
Nationals manager Blake Butera said Monday that Irvin (shoulder) remains shut down from throwing, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
The Nationals transferred Kranick (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Monday.
Herz (elbow) will throw to live hitters Friday at the Nationals' spring training facility in Florida, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
Williams (elbow) began pitching off a mound at the Nationals' spring training complex this weekend, Jessica Camerato of MLB.com reports.
Gray (elbow) has resumed a throwing program, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
The Nationals transferred Waldichuk (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Thursday.
